description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named OLive Tests that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use a matrix job that runs on both ubuntu-latest and windows-latest, with a fixed ort_version of 1.11.0. The job should check out the repository, set up Python 3.7, install a list of packages including onnx, numpy, and tensorflow, and then run a series of pytest tests for optimization and conversion.
